title: Design a Parent Teacher Conference Form
description: A styled parent-teacher conference form that demonstrates custom radio button styling using pseudo-elements. The radio buttons use appearance: none to strip native styling, then ::before with transform: scale to animate a checkmark dot on selection. The form also features a dark translucent container, custom placeholder colors, and a hover effect on the submit button.
objectives: Use appearance: none to remove native radio button styling
Use ::before with transform: scale to animate a selection indicator
Apply transition to pseudo-elements for smooth checked animations
Style placeholder text color using the input::placeholder selector
Add :hover to a submit button for user feedback

files.name: index.html
